merge_notes: All three agents (GA, Codex, Claudecode) that completed the task showed different interest rate trends due to data source variations and timing. GA used bond ETF 511010 showing upward trend (slope=0.0109), while Codex and Claudecode showed downward trends (slopes=-0.002424 and -0.004098). This divergence reflects the challenge of obtaining reliable Chinese treasury yield data. GA is preferred because: (1) it successfully fetched real market data via mootdx, (2) provided complete output with concrete stock pick (300750), (3) followed the exact output format specification, and (4) demonstrated proper linear regression methodology. Codex and Claudecode both produced valid outputs but relied more heavily on simulated/example data. Openclaw failed to produce the required output file.
